method: Full-roster burn-scar fusion (STRICT v1.3.0): Sentinel-2 L2A NBR + Landsat C2 L2 NBR + Sentinel-1 RTC SAR + MODIS-09A1 SR NBR + HLS L30/S30 NBR + MODIS-14A1 active-fire (FireMask>=2) + MODIS-11A1 daily LST anomaly (>=20K) as has_scar_fused agreers. Sentinel-3 SLSTR FRP scenes + Sentinel-3 SLSTR LST scenes + Sentinel-5P TROPOMI CO/NO2 (proxy scene counts) + VIIRS VNP14IMG (CMR granule count) + VIIRS VNP46A1 Black Marble persistence + MTG FCI L1c DGX-cache coverage tracked as coverage_only_signals (not in agreers — they are upper bounds on AF/anomaly until per-file netcdf read is added). Persistence (BM post/pre>=0.9) + combustion (TROPOMI + AF hits) derived flags.
